page: Microsoft Azure EC96as_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ECASv5 family. It features 96 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is configured with 672.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 7.0 GB of RAM per virtual core.

This server type does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external volumes. It is Premium Storage capable, allowing connection to high-performance persistent disks. There are zero integrated GPUs, making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated graphics or GPU-based machine learning workloads. Additionally, it does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the EC96as_v5 offers a high density of dedicated compute cores and memory, making it suitable for enterprise-scale workloads that require substantial memory capacity without the overhead of local physical disks. Recommended workloads include large-scale databases, memory-intensive enterprise applications, data warehousing, and heavy analytical processing.
description: Microsoft Azure EC96as_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server instance from the ECASv5 family, featuring 96 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance is equipped with 672.0 GB of system memory, yielding a ratio of 7.0 GB of RAM per virtual core. The server does not include local storage but is Premium Storage capable, enabling high-performance external disk attachments. It contains no GPUs and offers zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Designed for memory-intensive operations, the EC96as_v5 is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring high resource density. It is suited for large-scale databases, enterprise applications, and memory-heavy data processing tasks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC96as_v5 is an x86_64 server featuring 96 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 672 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage support. It is optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads and database applications.

tagline: A dedicated ninety-six core AMD instance featuring six hundred seventy-two gigabytes of memory for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
